name: Rusty Dusty
short_description: "Rusty Dusty es un juego 2D donde un robot de limpieza lucha por su libertad en un edificio residencial, enfrentando temas de clasismo. Los jugadores toman decisiones importantes que afectan el destino del protagonista."
detailed_description: Rusty Dusty is game that focusses in the story, ressources management, and decision-making . The story takes place in United States around 50´s, where the cleaning robots arrive to our lifes thanks to Mr Duster comany foundation. Among the robots we meet Rusty Dusty, our main character, who works in helping with household chores, being exploited by his boss. He will venture into a flat block to carry out his tasks, taking a tour of the different social classes. You will have to chose your path  to help Rusty Dusty achieve his freedom, testing your moral and having to make tough decissions...
